title: goniolimon tataricum subsp. croaticum
intro: Goniolimon tataricum subsp. croaticum, also known as Croatian frog-lily or Dalmatian sea-lavender, is a subspecies of the Goniolimon tataricum plant, which belongs to the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Goniolimon tataricum subsp. croaticum include relief from respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The herbal preparation of this plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically for therapeutic purposes.
